findings.message: New Redis scrape job configured but no corresponding alert rules defined. Redis monitoring has no alerting coverage.
findings.suggestion: Add a redis_alerts.yml file in infra/observability/prometheus/alerts/ with alert rules for Redis health and key metrics (e.g., RedisDown, RedisMemoryUsage, etc.)

findings.message: New Redis scrape job configured but no corresponding Grafana dashboard defined. Redis metrics have no visualization.
findings.suggestion: Add a redis.json dashboard in infra/observability/grafana/dashboards/ to visualize Redis metrics similar to the postgres.json dashboard structure

findings.message: Scrape target redis-exporter:9121 configured but the redis-exporter service is not defined in any Compose configuration file. The scrape will fail to find the target.
findings.suggestion: Add a redis-exporter service to infra/compose/observability.yml (following the postgres-exporter pattern) that exposes Redis metrics on port 9121, or add a redis service if Redis itself is not yet defined
